description: Test fixtures for compare.py self-test. Same schema as mapping.json. Loaded by compare.py --test-mode. All entries use Apple II addresses from the P2.0a frame-700 capture with known values; CoCo3 addresses are synthetic (not real port assignments). See verification/synthetic_coco3_capture.json for the matching synthetic CoCo3 capture.

citation.apple2: [ref: data-areas-catalog.md ZP$07 = 0x40 at P2.0a frame-700 capture]
citation.coco3: [no-ref: SYNTHETIC — DP$20 set to 0x40 in synthetic_coco3_capture.json to match. Proves match detection in compare.py.]

entries.notes: TEST FIXTURE. synthetic_coco3_capture.json DP$20=0x40 matches Apple II ZP$07=0x40. Expected compare.py result: MATCH.

citation.apple2: [ref: kernel.s ZP$E4 = 0x20 at P2.0a frame-700 capture (blit source page = page 1)]
citation.coco3: [no-ref: SYNTHETIC — DP$21 deliberately set to 0xFF in synthetic_coco3_capture.json. Proves mismatch detection in compare.py.]

entries.notes: TEST FIXTURE. synthetic_coco3_capture.json DP$21=0xFF != Apple II ZP$E4=0x20. Expected compare.py result: MISMATCH.

citation.apple2: [ref: kernel.s ZP$E0=0x09, ZP$E1=0x0A at P2.0a frame-700 capture; LE value = 0x0A09]
citation.coco3: [no-ref: SYNTHETIC — DP$22=0x0A (hi), DP$23=0x09 (lo) in synthetic_coco3_capture.json; BE value = 0x0A09. Proves endianness byte-swap in compare.py.]

entries.notes: TEST FIXTURE. Apple II LE: bytes[224]=0x09, bytes[225]=0x0A -> value 0x0A09. CoCo3 BE: bytes[34]=0x0A, bytes[35]=0x09 -> value 0x0A09. Match after endianness compensation. Expected compare.py result: MATCH.

citation.coco3: [no-ref: SYNTHETIC TEST FIXTURE — null address; proves compare.py reports pending, not mismatch.]

entries.notes: TEST FIXTURE. coco3.address=null with status apple2-confirmed-coco3-predicted. Expected compare.py result: PENDING (not MISMATCH).
